sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_estimate: Computes a combinational fixed-point initial Newton-Raphson estimate from the input magnitude.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration: Computes one combinational Newton-Raphson refinement step using fixed-point scaled division.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Compares consecutive Newton-Raphson estimates and asserts convergence when the difference is within one LSB.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_fixed_sqrt: Computes the fixed-point integer square root of X shifted by the fractional scale for precise final rounding.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_result_select: Selects the final square-root result while handling zero and fallback cases.
